ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ccgs" (
  "ccg_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to each CCG */,
  "ccg_name" TEXT /* Name of the CCG */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the CCG is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population covered by the CCG */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the CCG was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ccg_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_types" (
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer type */,
  "cancer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cancer type (e.g., Carcinoma, Sarcoma) */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the cancer type (e.g., Breast, Lung) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "ccg_code" TEXT /* CCG code associated with the metric */,
  "cancer_type_id" INTEGER /* Cancer type ID associated with the metric */,
  "total_treated" INTEGER /* Total number of patients treated */,
  "within_standard" INTEGER /* Number of patients treated within the standard waiting time */,
  "branches" INTEGER /* Number of branches involved in treatment */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance ratio (within standard / total treated) */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard against which performance is measured */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the performance data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., HES, CCG) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_standard FOREIGN KEY ("standard") REFERENCES standards ("standard_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_cancer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_type_id") REFERENCES cancer_types ("cancer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_quality FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_ccg_code FOREIGN KEY ("ccg_code") REFERENCES ccgs ("ccg_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "target" REAL /* Target value for the standard */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, clinical staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Cancer Services, Public Health) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user (e.g., Cancer Data Analyst, Consultant Oncologist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the metric (e.g., filters, aggregations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_histories_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality rating */,
  "quality_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)
